title: Mildly Spiced British Lamb Stew
description: A savory and springy weeknight British dish featuring lamb, mildly spiced and cooked to perfection in a cataplana vessel, halal-friendly and colored with red food coloring, served with a side of lamination-puff pastry
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in the cataplana vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the cataplana vessel and cook until softened.
Add the lamb cubes to the cataplana vessel and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped carrot and potato to the cataplana vessel and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the mild curry powder, salt, and black pepper to the cataplana vessel and stir to combine.
Add the red food coloring to the cataplana vessel and stir to combine.
Cover the cataplana vessel with puff pastry and bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour.
Remove the cataplana vessel from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
